app.name: Forge Orchestrator
app.one_liner: A Rust-based CLI tool that coordinates multiple AI coding agents through shared state, file locking, knowledge capture, and drift detection.

screens.name: Task Board
screens.purpose: Display the current task graph with assignments, dependencies, and project health.

rust_commands.name: init
rust_commands.purpose: Initialize the .forge/ directory with state, event log, and knowledge base.

rust_commands.name: plan
rust_commands.purpose: Generate a dependency-aware task graph from SPEC.md or README.

rust_commands.name: status
rust_commands.purpose: Display the current task board with assignments, dependencies, and project health.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate basic task planning from SPEC.md
acceptance_tests: Executing `forge plan --generate` produces a dependency-aware task graph from SPEC.md.
Multiple AI tools (Claude, Codex, Gemini) can operate on the same repo without conflicting edits due to file locking.
Running `forge init` creates a .forge/ directory with state, event log, and knowledge base.
The `forge status` command displays task assignments and project health without errors.
